---
title: "Sponsorship Opportunities"
---

We are actively seeking academic and corporate partners for the TAIH Symposium 2026. Sponsoring our event provides an excellent opportunity to showcase your organization to leading researchers and top-tier students at the University of Calgary.

### Why Sponsor?
* **Visibility:** Gain exposure among leading AI and technology practitioners.
* **Recruitment:** Network directly with top graduate students and postdocs.
* **Impact:** Support the growth of our transdisciplinary AI academic community.

### Sponsorship Tiers & Benefits

| Benefit | **Diamond** | **Gold** |
|:---|:---:|:---:|
| Company logo placement on event website & included in "Thank you to our sponsors" email  | ✓ | ✓ |
| Company promotional brief video at the opening session acknowledgement | ✓ | |
| Branded table at the symposium | ✓ | |
| **Rate** | **$5,000 CAD** | **$2,000 CAD** |
: {tbl-colwidths="[70,15,15]"}

<br>

If your organization is interested in sponsoring the symposium, please contact us at [transdisciplinaryaihub@gmail.com](mailto:transdisciplinaryaihub@gmail.com).
